assignments.name: question
assignments.value: How should I prepare for the Amazon TPM interview loop?

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { vector: $json.query_vector, limit: $json.top_k, with_payload: true, with_vector: false } }}

nodes.name: Build Stage 1 Gate And Reranker Request

parameters.jsCode:
const base = $items('Build Stage 1 Gate And Reranker Request')[0].json;
const now = Date.now();
const guildId = '853099205206999050';
const topResults = (base.candidates || []).slice(0, 10).map(c => ({
  qdrant_point_id: c.qdrant_point_id,
  retrieval_rank: c.retrieval_rank,
  retrieval_score: c.retrieval_score,
  reranker_rank: null,
  reranker_score: null,
  selected_for_context: false,
  channel_id: c.channel_id || null,
  channel_name: c.channel_name || null,
  thread_name: c.thread_name || null,
  first_message_id: c.first_message_id || null,
  message_ids: c.message_ids,
  start_ts: c.start_ts,
  end_ts: c.end_ts,
  authors: c.authors,
  discord_link: c.channel_id && c.first_message_id ? `https://discord.com/channels/${guildId}/${c.channel_id}/${c.first_message_id}` : null,
  text_preview: String(c.text || '').slice(0, 1200),
  gate_status: c.retrieval_score >= Number(base.retrieval_score_threshold) ? 'passed_stage_1' : 'excluded',
  exclusion_reason: c.retrieval_score >= Number(base.retrieval_score_threshold) ? null : 'retrieval_score_below_threshold'
}));
return [{ json: {
  regression_id: base.regression_id,
  category: base.category || null,
  question: base.question,
  normalized_query: base.normalized_query,
  expected_action: base.expected_action || null,
  expected_caveat: base.expected_caveat || null,
  expected_flags: base.expected_flags || null,
  source_area: base.source_area || null,
  evaluator_notes: base.evaluator_notes || null,
  corpus: { collection: base.qdrant_collection, corpus_version: base.corpus_version, status: base.collection_status, points_count: base.collection_points_count, indexed_vectors_count: base.collection_indexed_vectors_count },
  decision: 'no_context',
  refusal_reason: base.stage_1_refusal_reason,
  stage_1: { status: 'refused', raw_count: base.raw_candidate_count, passed_count: base.passed_candidate_count, threshold: Number(base.retrieval_score_threshold), minimum_required: Number(base.min_result_count) },
  reranker: { status: 'skipped_after_stage_1_refusal', model: 'cross-encoder/ms-marco-MiniLM-L-6-v2', candidate_count: 0, passed_count: 0, selected_count: 0, threshold: Number(base.reranker_score_threshold), weak_signal_threshold: Number(base.weak_reranker_score_threshold), weak_signal: false },
  dedupe_status: 'not_implemented_phase_6',
  top_results: topResults,
  latency_ms: { embedding: base.embedding_latency_ms, retrieval: base.qdrant_latency_ms, reranking: 0, reranker_service: null, total: now - base.evaluation_started_ms }
}}];

main.node: Build Stage 1 Gate And Reranker Request
